title: Formula 1 App - Dynamic Standing
description:
Introducing the new F1 App feature for iPhone 14 pro series users: the Dynamic Island Standings View! With this innovative feature, you can quickly and easily check on the current driver standings with just a few taps. Simply force touch on the dynamic island to expand the view and see the live standings in greater detail.

Let me know what you think of this concept.

blocks.html:
Overview

Introducing the new F1 App feature for iPhone 14 pro series users: the Dynamic Island Standings View! With this innovative feature, you can quickly and easily check on the current driver standings with just a few taps. Simply force touch on the dynamic island to expand the view and see the live standings in greater detail.

Let me know what you think of this concept.
